plugins.name: castify
plugins.description: Make asciinema recordings scriptable: script every keystroke and pause instead of performing the session live, so casts are reproducible and automatable — and so you can even record interactive TUIs like fzf. Includes the tmux-driven harness and a web-embedding guide.

plugins.name: dev-kit
plugins.description: A Human + AI teaming development workflow. /dev-kit:ship orchestrates a change end to end (plan in a worktree, implement with tiered subagent delegation, simplify, refresh docs, review, PR); /dev-kit:review-pr runs a full review battery plus a context-chosen adversarial pass on your own or a teammate's PR; /dev-kit:generate-docs builds a self-contained docs site that works from file:// and GitHub Pages.
